dimensio 0.3.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Object Summaries

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/summary.R
summary.Rd

Provides a summary of the results of a multivariate data analysis.

Usage

# S4 method for CA
summary(object, margin = 1, active = TRUE, sup = TRUE, rank = 3)

# S4 method for PCA
summary(object, margin = 1, active = TRUE, sup = TRUE, rank = 3)

Arguments

object

A CA or PCA object.

margin

A length-one numeric vector giving the subscript which the data will be summarized: 1 indicates individuals/rows (the default), 2 indicates variables/columns.

active

A logical scalar: should the active observations be summarized?

sup

A logical scalar: should the supplementary observations be summarized?

rank

An integer value specifying the maximal number of components to be kept in the results.

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Data from Lebart et al. 2006, p. 170-172
data("colours")

## Compute correspondence analysis
X <- ca(colours)

## Rows summary
summary(X, margin = 1)
#> --- Correspondence Analysis (CA) ------------------------------------------------
#> 
#> Eigenvalues:
#>    eigenvalues variance cumulative
#> F1       0.209   89.373     89.373
#> F2       0.022    9.515     98.888
#> F3       0.003    1.112    100.000
#> 
#> Active rows:
#>          inertia CA1_coord CA1_contrib CA1_cos2 CA2_coord CA2_contrib CA2_cos2
#> marron    93.086    -0.492      43.116    0.967    -0.088      13.042    0.031
#> noisette  13.089    -0.213       3.401    0.542     0.167      19.804    0.336
#> vert      16.085     0.162       1.355    0.176     0.339      55.910    0.773
#> bleu     111.337     0.547      52.128    0.977    -0.083      11.244    0.022
#>          CA3_coord CA3_contrib CA3_cos2
#> marron       0.022       6.680    0.002
#> noisette    -0.101      61.086    0.121
#> vert         0.088      31.925    0.052
#> bleu        -0.005       0.310    0.000

## Columns summary
summary(X, margin = 2)
#> --- Correspondence Analysis (CA) ------------------------------------------------
#> 
#> Eigenvalues:
#>    eigenvalues variance cumulative
#> F1       0.209   89.373     89.373
#> F2       0.022    9.515     98.888
#> F3       0.003    1.112    100.000
#> 
#> Active columns:
#>         inertia CA1_coord CA1_contrib CA1_cos2 CA2_coord CA2_contrib CA2_cos2
#> brun     55.425    -0.505      22.246    0.838    -0.215      37.877    0.152
#> chatain  12.284    -0.148       5.086    0.864     0.033       2.319    0.042
#> roux     15.095    -0.130       0.964    0.133     0.320      55.131    0.812
#> blond   150.793     0.835      71.704    0.993    -0.070       4.673    0.007
#>         CA3_coord CA3_contrib CA3_cos2
#> brun        0.056      21.633    0.010
#> chatain    -0.049      44.284    0.094
#> roux        0.083      31.913    0.055
#> blond       0.016       2.171    0.000

On this page

dimensio is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.9000.
